title: thymus stankovii
intro: Thymus stankovii is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as thyme. It is native to the Balkan Peninsula and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as coughs, colds, and respiratory problems, due to their expectorant and antiseptic properties. Thymus stankovii can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote digestion and relieve stress.
